description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the marcoturi/ionic:latest Docker image, with a cache keyed by $CI_PROJECT_ID that stores node_modules/ and .yarn and includes untracked files. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a build_web job that runs only on the master branch and executes npm run lint, npm run scss-lint, npm run test, npm run build, and npm run e2e. In the deploy stage add a build_android job that runs only on the release branch, runs ls, npm run android:release, ls ./platforms/android/build/outputs/apk/android*.apk, and publishes the generated APKs from platforms/android/build/outputs/apk/ as artifacts. Also add a build_ios job that runs only on the release branch, runs ./sh/ionic-login.sh, ls, npm run ios:release:ci, and ./sh/ionic-package-ios.sh. All jobs inherit a before_script that sets the Yarn cache folder, runs yarn install, and runs npm run post-install.
